quest.Name: Find the Lost Garden
quest.Accomplishment: You solved the mystery of the Lost Garden of Geth.

step.Name: Find the Lost Garden
step.text: Find the Lost Garden of Geth hidden away in the Rubber Orchard.

step.Name: Find out what happened in the Lost Garden
step.text: Solve the mystery of the Lost Garden of Geth.

step.Name: Report Back to Mudokah
step.text: Inform Mudokah that the Lost Garden of Geth has been found.
